creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Everyone (including comitters and core team members, I've seen their laptops in person and asked them) buys FreeBSD stickers from third parties because the foundation requires (R) at all times on the FreeBSD logo. Afaict nobody else in our industry does this except us.

I have no FreeBSD stickers because I want to buy them from the us instead of letting some random third party profit, and the (R) just looks hideous.

This also looks very silly on the newish bootloader.

FreeBSD is an extremely established brand. This is the torchbearer of the original operating system distribution.

Please, take back the FreeBSD brand by removing this excessive requirement. I think I can safely speak for the community in this regard that everyone would prefer to buy them from the Foundation store. Thank you for your consideration.
